title: Perm, Perm Krai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Perm, Perm Krai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Perm is a city in Perm Krai with a population of 1,050,000. A major city on the Kama River in the Urals, known for its oil refining, aerospace industry, and vibrant contemporary art scene.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
